title: Athlone, Westmeath — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Athlone, Westmeath: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Athlone is a city in Westmeath with a population of 22,000. The heart of Ireland, a historic town on the River Shannon with a magnificent castle, a vibrant marina, and a strategic location at the crossroads of Ireland.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
